_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=94.5 (set at 95.27 after slack/atlassian serviceId+ADF text-node pin + skills regex anchor + security empty breaches + 2 equivalent-mutant pragmas, buffer 0.77). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
